robots.name: Bloch Sphere
robots.description: 3D qubit state visualization — drag to orbit, apply X/Y/Z/H/S/T gates, see state vector + probabilities update.

robots.name: Quantum Gates Explorer
robots.description: Interactive gate reference — click any gate to see its matrix, effect on |0⟩ and |1⟩, Bloch sphere rotation, and properties.

robots.name: Entanglement
robots.description: Bell pair experiment — create entangled qubits, measure Alice, watch Bob collapse. Run 100x to see 100% correlation.

robots.name: Grover's Search
robots.description: Quantum search — watch amplitude amplification find the target in √N steps. Auto-run mode, adjustable qubits, measurement.
